name: ll-insights
description: Ingest analytics/support/feedback via luna-rag, run chain analysis, emit impact-scored backlog. LunaOS's open answer to Cepien's discovery loop.
author: LunaOS

tools.name: rag-ingestor
tools.description: Ingest analytics, support tickets, and user feedback into luna-rag vector store

tools.name: pattern-detector
tools.description: Cluster + tag issues via luna-agents chain (rag + graph-rag)

tools.name: impact-scorer
tools.description: Apply engine impact-scoring primitive across business/product/usability/environmental dimensions

tools.name: backlog-emitter
tools.description: Emit prioritized backlog as JSON, webhook, or LunaOS workflow dispatch

min_impact_score.description: Min combined impact score to include in backlog

impact_weights.description: Override default impact weights (must sum to ~1)

target_workflow_id.description: LunaOS workflow to dispatch top recommendation (when emit_to=workflow)
